projectDescription: An AI agent skill that automates dialectical reasoning through Electric Monks — subagents that believe opposing positions at full conviction, enabling users to analyze contradictions from a belief-free position.
keyFeatures: Electric Monks — subagents that believe positions at full conviction
Seven-phase dialectical process from interview to recursive synthesis
Belief burden calibration patterns for different cognitive styles
Boydian decomposition for cross-domain structural analysis
Hegelian Aufhebung (sublation) synthesis that transforms questions
Recursive depth — each synthesis becomes the next round's thesis
Domain-adaptive research strategies for technical and personal decisions
publicApiSurface: Phase 6: Validation by Monks + Hostile Auditor
Belief Burden Patterns: Convergent Visionary, Empathic Integrator, Exploratory Debater, Practical Executor, Possibility Explorer, Steady Guardian
Domain Adaptation Modes: External-Research, Personal/Values, Mixed Domains
